use_cases: Email newsletter signup for content creators and blogs
Email capture for product announcements and updates
Subscription form for marketing email lists
Landing page email capture with animated feedback
Simple newsletter signup for building subscriber audiences
ai_summary: A newsletter signup component with email input field and animated success state transition using Framer Motion. Supports light and dark modes, features stacked circular profile images suggesting social proof, and morphs smoothly from form to confirmation state upon subscription. Clean, minimalist design suitable for SaaS landing pages, creator platforms, and email marketing capture forms.
